item.title: Bhashiva Character Pack - What's included?
item.description:
Hello, Total War Community!

To the west of Grand Cathay, in the Mountains of Mourn resides a force long spoken of in legend: the Tiger Warriors, led by their champion, Bhashiva, the Desert Tigress, White Tiger of Shang-Yang. With her arrival comes new ways to wage war, new units forged by ancient tradition, and new campaign mechanics that reflect a mercenary force bound by honour.

This blog will aim to give you a general overview of what’s in the pack, including lore introductions, battle & campaign gameplay insights, and an introduction to the free Legendary Hero coming with Patch 8.0.

Before we begin, if you haven’t watched it yet, check out the gameplay overview trailer:



👉 READ THE FULL BLOG HERE 👈


— The Total War Team

For the latest news and announcements, don't forget to visit our official social channels. Steam X Facebook Instagram Discord [url=https://bsky.app/profile/totalwar.bsky.social style=button]Bluesky[/url]
item.content:encoded:
Hello, Total War Community!

To the west of Grand Cathay, in the Mountains of Mourn resides a force long spoken of in legend: the Tiger Warriors, led by their champion, Bhashiva, the Desert Tigress, White Tiger of Shang-Yang. With her arrival comes new ways to wage war, new units forged by ancient tradition, and new campaign mechanics that reflect a mercenary force bound by honour.

This blog will aim to give you a general overview of what’s in the pack, including lore introductions, battle & campaign gameplay insights, and an introduction to the free Legendary Hero coming with Patch 8.0.

Before we begin, if you haven’t watched it yet, check out the gameplay overview trailer:



👉 READ THE FULL BLOG HERE 👈


— The Total War Team

For the latest news and announcements, don't forget to visit our official social channels. Steam X Facebook Instagram Discord [url=https://bsky.app/profile/totalwar.bsky.social style=button]Bluesky[/url]

item.title: Hotfix 1.11.7 - Patch Notes
item.description:
Warband!

Hotfix 1.11.7 is now being rolled out on all platforms. This hotfix only contains the following change:

  • Fixed an issue that could cause players to disconnect when another player left a mission right when said mission failed.

That’s all for today! 

We’ll see you on the Mourningstar. 

– The Darktide Team
item.content:encoded:
Warband!

Hotfix 1.11.7 is now being rolled out on all platforms. This hotfix only contains the following change:

  • Fixed an issue that could cause players to disconnect when another player left a mission right when said mission failed.

That’s all for today! 

We’ll see you on the Mourningstar. 

– The Darktide Team

item.title: Battlesector & Gladius will take part in Warhammer Skulls Festival
item.description:
We’re excited to announce that Warhammer 40,000: Battlesector and Warhammer 40,000: Gladius will be taking part in Warhammer Skulls 2026!

The Skulls festival will run from Thursday, May 21st, at 5:00 PM UK until Thursday, May 28th.

Don’t miss the live showcase on the official Warhammer Twitch channel on Thursday, May 21st at 5:00 PM UK time.

Stay tuned, and discover more about Skulls here.
item.content:encoded:
We’re excited to announce that Warhammer 40,000: Battlesector and Warhammer 40,000: Gladius will be taking part in Warhammer Skulls 2026!

The Skulls festival will run from Thursday, May 21st, at 5:00 PM UK until Thursday, May 28th.

Don’t miss the live showcase on the official Warhammer Twitch channel on Thursday, May 21st at 5:00 PM UK time.

Stay tuned, and discover more about Skulls here.

item.title: Bhashiva Character Pack - Faction Overview
item.description:
Hey folks!

The Bhashiva Character Pack introduces Bhashiva, The White Tiger, as a new playable Legendary Lord alongside deadly new Tiger Warrior units for the armies of Grand Cathay. 



The Bhashiva Character Pack is available May 21st 📅

— The Total War Team

For the latest news and announcements, don't forget to visit our official social channels. Steam X Facebook Instagram Discord [url=https://bsky.app/profile/totalwar.bsky.social style=button]Bluesky[/url]
item.content:encoded:
Hey folks!

The Bhashiva Character Pack introduces Bhashiva, The White Tiger, as a new playable Legendary Lord alongside deadly new Tiger Warrior units for the armies of Grand Cathay. 



The Bhashiva Character Pack is available May 21st 📅

— The Total War Team

For the latest news and announcements, don't forget to visit our official social channels. Steam X Facebook Instagram Discord [url=https://bsky.app/profile/totalwar.bsky.social style=button]Bluesky[/url]

item.title: Mechanicus II Launches Next Week!
item.description:
Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus II will officially launch on May 21st, 2026, coinciding with the start of this year’s Warhammer Skulls Festival.

Since our first reveal in Warhammer Skulls two years ago, and right up to our demo last October, we’ve been incredibly grateful for all the feedback, excitement, theories and patience from our community. We’ve been hard at work refining and expanding the experience, and we cannot wait to finally place it in your hands.

To celebrate the announcement, we’ve released a new leader deep-dive video to introduce you to two more key characters in the war to come: Lector-Dogmatis Videx, a zealous preacher of the Machine God’s orthodoxy, and Lord Obasis, the Sankhotep dynasty’s implacable bulwark against disorder.

Whether you’re terraforming new ground in the name of the Omnissiah, or awakening to reclaim a domain that was once yours, the bitter war for the world of Hekateus IV begins on May 21st.

Wishlist now and join us in our community Discord for all the latest news and discussions.
item.content:encoded:
Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus II will officially launch on May 21st, 2026, coinciding with the start of this year’s Warhammer Skulls Festival.

Since our first reveal in Warhammer Skulls two years ago, and right up to our demo last October, we’ve been incredibly grateful for all the feedback, excitement, theories and patience from our community. We’ve been hard at work refining and expanding the experience, and we cannot wait to finally place it in your hands.

To celebrate the announcement, we’ve released a new leader deep-dive video to introduce you to two more key characters in the war to come: Lector-Dogmatis Videx, a zealous preacher of the Machine God’s orthodoxy, and Lord Obasis, the Sankhotep dynasty’s implacable bulwark against disorder.

Whether you’re terraforming new ground in the name of the Omnissiah, or awakening to reclaim a domain that was once yours, the bitter war for the world of Hekateus IV begins on May 21st.

Wishlist now and join us in our community Discord for all the latest news and discussions.
